operation: First, create a base 30 mm x 30 mm x 15 mm rectangular box on the XY workplane. Next, construct the cut feature: shift the XZ workplane 5 units along the Y axis, draw a 10 mm x 5 mm rectangle on this offset workplane, then extrude the rectangle 15 mm along the Y direction. Finally, subtract this extruded cut shape from the base box to get the final model.
geometry: The model is a square-based rectangular prism (block) as the main structure, with a smaller rectangular prismatic cutout that enters through one of its vertical side faces, runs parallel to the top and bottom faces of the main block, and does not extend fully through to the opposite side of the block.
function: This is a compact alignment or mounting fixture block, designed to seat, position, or guide a thin flat mating component at a fixed offset position within a larger assembly.
